flashcards.definition: Energy transferred between objects due to a temperature difference; measured in joules or calories.
The energy needed to raise 1 g of water by 1°C. 1 cal = 4.184 J.
The SI unit of energy. 1 kJ = 1000 J.
Temperature: average KE of particles. Heat: total energy transferred.
Convert between J, kJ, cal, and kcal using: 1 cal = 4.184 J, 1 kcal = 4184 J.
